chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 474 of 2025 [Abdul Sattar & others vs. PO Sindh & others] Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 08-10-2025 On 30-09-2025, the following order was passed;- None present for the Petitioners nor any intimation is received; same was the position on the last date of hearing. Under the circumstances, this Petition is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution; however, in the interest of justice, adjourned to 08-10-2025. Let intimation notice be issued to the Counsel for the Petitioners for the said date. Counsel for the Petitioners is also directed to satisfy the Court about maintainability of this Petition as the Petitioners have old disability certificates, which are not issued by the Board constituted under the Act, 2018. Today, Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Muzafar Ali Dahraj, learned counsel for the Petitioners requests for adjournment. The request for adjournment so made by the Counsel is totally unjustified where this Court has already directed the Counsel for the Petitioners to satisfy about the maintainability of this Petition. Perusal of the prayer clause reflects that in this matter the disability certificates produced by the Petitioners have not been issued by the Board constituted under the Act, 2018. In the circumstances, the Petition is dismissed; however, the Petitioners are at liberty to approach the Board and obtain disability certificates in accordance with the law and thereafter they may approach the Respondents for appointment on the basis of disabled quota. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
